description: A full-length snapshot photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) showing Secretary of State Marco Rubio standing against a curved wood-paneled wall, an interior cabin (the tweet says aboard Air Force One). He wears a heather-grey Nike Tech fleece tracksuit (zip hoodie with the Nike swoosh and matching jogger pants) with grey Adidas sneakers, hands in pockets, looking at the camera. A wall-mounted TV in the upper right shows a Fox News 'LIVE' broadcast. The image is a phone photo with no graphic treatment. The tweet caption (RT of @StevenCheung47) reads: 'Secretary Rubio rocking the Nike Tech ‘Venezuela’ on Air Force One!'
notable_text: (no on-image text) - caption: 'Secretary Rubio rocking the Nike Tech ‘Venezuela’ on Air Force One!'
